title: Badgers women ready for Western Province
description: CRICEKT NEWS - The Garden Route Badgers...
bodyText: [{"type":"intro_bold","text":"This is an important weekend for Zintle Kula and her team. A positive start will be vital."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"CRICEKT NEWS - The Garden Route Badgers women’s team will continue their quest for a place in the final of the Hollywoodbets Pro50 series when they take on the World Sports Betting Western Province at Newlands in Cape Town this weekend.","html":"CRICEKT NEWS - The Garden Route Badgers women’s team will continue their quest for a place in the final of the Hollywoodbets Pro50 series when they take on the World Sports Betting Western Province at Newlands in Cape Town this weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Badgers are currently third on the Pro50 log and have an opportunity to play themselves into a place in the finals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Oudtshoorn-based team will go without Annerie Dercksen, who is on national duty, and Mieke de Ridder and Yolandi Potgieter, who are both injured.","html":"The Oudtshoorn-based team will go without Annerie Dercksen, who is on national duty, and Mieke de Ridder and Yolandi Potgieter, who are both injured."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This is an important weekend for Zintle Kula and her team. A positive start will be vital. The team will be focused as they will be in action for five consecutive weekends.","html":"This is an important weekend for Zintle Kula and her team. A positive start will be vital. The team will be focused as they will be in action for five consecutive weekends."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Pro50 match takes place on Saturday and the Pro20 match on Sunday.","html":"The Pro50 match takes place on Saturday and the Pro20 match on Sunday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The squad:","html":"The squad:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Zintle Kula (captain), Gizelle Abrahams, Izel Cilliers, Tiché Frans, Nicolien Janse van Rensburg, Julia Hoal, Palesa Mapoo, Khayakaze Mathe, Nadine Moodley, Anica Swart and Lucian Swartz.","html":"Zintle Kula (captain), Gizelle Abrahams, Izel Cilliers, Tiché Frans, Nicolien Janse van Rensburg, Julia Hoal, Palesa Mapoo, Khayakaze Mathe, Nadine Moodley, Anica Swart and Lucian Swartz."}]
